fingerprint_check.title: Fingerprint Integrity Check
fingerprint_check.description: Whether a fingerprint integrity check was performed

fingerprint_count.title: Fingerprint Records Analyzed
fingerprint_count.description: Number of fingerprint records analyzed (required when check is true).

signature_check.title: Signature Integrity Check
signature_check.description: Whether a signature integrity check was performed

signature_count.title: Signature Records Analyzed
signature_count.description: Number of signature records analyzed (required when check is true).

chain_check.title: Chain Traceability Check
chain_check.description: Whether a chain traceability check was performed

chain_count.title: Chain Records Analyzed
chain_count.description: Number of chain records analyzed (required when check is true).

date_check.title: Date Traceability Check
date_check.description: Whether a date traceability check was performed

date_count.title: Date Records Analyzed
date_count.description: Number of date records analyzed (required when check is true).

InvoiceAnomalyLaunch.description: InvoiceAnomalyLaunch contains the results of launching an anomaly detection process on invoice records.
